items.title: 2 Undervalued AI Stocks You Can Buy Now
items.author: Parkev Tatevosian, Cfa
items.description: The stock market has been rallying, making it challenging to find undervalued stocks. Investors are concerned about high market valuations, suggesting potential opportunities in select AI-related stocks.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned as a potential investment opportunity in the AI and technology sector, with current market capitalization of $2.4T
Referenced in the article as a potential investment, though specific details about its AI potential are not elaborated
